# SCORE Register Your Business and EIN General Education

Last reviewed for BOSS Library ingestion: 2026-06-21

## BOSS Library tags
score, plan-start, formation

## Resource purpose
General education about registration and EIN steps.

## How the BOSS AI Librarian should use this resource
Use when the user has completed enough concept validation to prepare formation tasks.

## Best-fit BOSS lifecycle stage
Formation

## Route the user here when
The user is ready for formation basics and asks about registering or EIN.

## BOSS routing notes
- Do not push registration before validation; do not complete official forms.

## Related SCORE links

## Response pattern for BOSS
Use this resource as a routing destination, not as a substitute for professional legal, tax, lending, procurement, or compliance advice. For time-sensitive workshops, deadlines, prices, contact details, or eligibility rules, send the user to the live source URL first.
